body.title: NE prediction error → per-turn graph training
body.result: Implemented D228 step 2: NE prediction error → per-turn graph training. Before each NE cycle, collect seed memory IDs from TWM obs metadata and run spreading_activation. After _apply_output, compare predicted-hot nodes vs actually promoted IDs. Hits call reinforce_links(seed, hit_ids, +0.05); misses call reinforce_links(seed, miss_ids, -0.02). Gated by IGOR_PREDICTION_ERROR_ENABLED (default false). Modified: narrative_engine.py (added _train_prediction_error, modified _apply_output to return promoted_ids, pre-seed snapshot in run()). 10 tests. Commit 11fd32a1.
body.description: Every NE cycle computes expected vs actual activation. Delta = training signal: edges that predicted correctly strengthen, edges that missed weaken. Makes NE a continuous graph trainer rather than a content surfacer. Implementation: after each NE cycle, compare TWM state before/after, compute delta per node, call cortex edge weight update. Ref: D228 step 2. Prereq: T-spreading-activation.
